region.description: OVH region (e.g. GRA11, SBG5, BHS5). Tip: list with `openstack region list`.

flavor.description: OpenStack flavor name (e.g. b3-8, c3-8). Tip: list with `openstack flavor list`.

network.description: Neutron network name or UUID. Use 'Ext-Net' for the OVH public network, or your vRack/private network. Tip: list with `openstack network list`.
